name: dialysis_sched
description: a dialysis chair scheduling world across sessions; actions schedule, swap, miss

card.description: a dialysis chair scheduling world across sessions; actions schedule, swap, miss

rules: Each session seats at most `chairs` patients; no session may exceed capacity.
A patient appears at most once in any single session (no double-booking a chair).
`schedule` first admits any perceived referral onto the waitlist, then seats the next waiting patient in the first session that has an open chair.
`swap` relocates one booked patient from a fuller session to a session with room; it never changes how many patients are booked overall.
`miss` frees a booked patient's chair, increments missed_count, and returns the recurring session need to the waitlist.
Derived totals (scheduled_count, open_slots, waitlist_len, utilization) are recomputed every step and are always consistent with `assignments`.
Dynamics are deterministic: the next state depends only on (state, action).

emit.report: Dialysis roster — {scheduled_count} sessions booked across {chairs} chairs ({utilization} utilization), {open_slots} open chairs, {waitlist_len} waiting, {missed_count} missed, {swaps} swaps.
